title: L'Argent
writer: Marcel L'Herbier, Arthur Bernède, Émile Zola
actors: Brigitte Helm, Marie Glory, Pierre Alcover
plot: The business tycoon Nicolas Saccard is nearly ruined by his rival Gunderman, when he tries to raise capital for his company. To push up the price of his stock, Saccard plans a publicity stunt involving the aviator Jacques Hamelin ...
